<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by /forge:init — confidence: 94% -->

# Database

grove is a **stateless engine** — it has no database, no persistence layer, and no mutable shared state between invocations. All data is computed on demand from source files and the grammar registry.

## Data Stores

| Store | Type | Location | Persistence |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| Source files | Filesystem | Project tree | Read-only input |
| Grammar WASM + tags | File cache | `~/.cache/grove/grammars/<lang>/` | Cached, reconstructible |
| Grammar lock | JSON file | `grove.lock` (project root) | Committed to VCS |
| Grammar registry (dev) | Directory tree | `registry/<lang>/` | Shipped in source tree |
| Hosted catalog | JSON file | Remote `index.json` | Fetched on demand |

## Entity Relationships

```
┌─────────────┐     loads      ┌──────────────┐
│  Source file │───────────────▶│   Grammar     │
│  (.rs/.py/.js)│              │  (WASM + SCM) │
└─────────────┘                └──────┬───────┘
       │                              │
       │ parses                       │ extracts
       ▼                              ▼
┌─────────────┐              ┌──────────────┐
│  Parse tree │              │   Symbol[]   │
│  (in-memory) │              │  Defect[]    │
└─────────────┘              └──────────────┘
                                     │
                                     │ groups by file
                                     ▼
                              ┌──────────────┐
                              │   FileMap[]   │
                              │  (map output) │
                              └──────────────┘
```

## Key Data Types (in-memory, per invocation)

### Symbol
The central domain object produced by all structural tools.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | String | Stable handle: `<lang>:<relpath>#<name>@<line>` (1-based) |
| name | String | Symbol name |
| kind | String | e.g. `function`, `method`, `class`, `call` |
| is_definition | bool | True for definitions, false for references |
| file | String | Repo-relative path |
| line | usize | 1-based line number |
| col | usize | 1-based column number |
| start_byte | usize | Byte offset of the whole symbol |
| end_byte | usize | End byte offset |
| signature | String | Trimmed source line containing the name |
| parent | Option\<String\> | Owning container (impl type, class, module) |

### Defect
Syntax error found by `check`.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| kind | &'static str | `"ERROR"` or `"MISSING"` |
| line | usize | 1-based line |
| col | usize | 1-based column |
| start_byte | usize | Byte offset start |
| end_byte | usize | Byte offset end |
| text | String | The error node's text |

### CallSite
Reference site found by `callers`.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| file | String | File containing the reference |
| line | usize | 1-based line |
| col | usize | 1-based column |
| text | String | The reference text |
| in_function | Option\<String\> | Enclosing function name |
| source | String | `"structural"` or `"textual"` |

### FileMap / MapEntry
Compact directory-level dependency graph.

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| file | String | File path |
| entries | Vec\<MapEntry\> | Definitions in this file |

MapEntry adds `references: Vec<String>` to the definition symbol — listing which other symbols each definition uses.

### Grammar / Profile / Manifest
Grammar metadata and language-specific behavioral profiles.

| Type | Key Fields |
|------|-----------|
| Manifest | `name`, `version`, `extensions[]`, `source{repo,rev}`, `profile` |
| Profile | `function_kinds[]`, `containers[(kind, name_field)]`, `identifier_kinds[]`, `call_kinds[]`, `import_resolution` |
| Grammar | `name`, `version`, `wasm: Arc<Vec<u8>>`, `tags_query: Arc<String>`, `locals_query`, `imports_query`, `profile: Arc<Profile>` |

## Cache Behavior

- Grammars are loaded once per process via `OnceLock` (WASM engine + parser)
- The language index (`Manifest[]`) is built once and cached
- Individual `Grammar` structs are cached in a `Mutex<HashMap<String, Grammar>>`
- No cache invalidation within a process lifetime — stateless by design

## Lockfile Format (`grove.lock`)

```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "grammars": [
    { "name": "javascript", "version": "0.23.1", "wasm": "sha256:..." },
    { "name": "python", "version": "0.23.6", "wasm": "sha256:..." },
    { "name": "rust", "version": "0.24.0", "wasm": "sha256:..." }
  ]
}
```

Deterministic (sorted) so it's diff-friendly and commit-friendly.
